hero.title: The King of
hero.subtitle: Solitaire, Ronda, Belote and 7 more legendary card games in one premium app. Real-time multiplayer, offline mode, and an experience worthy of modern Morocco.
feat.title: Why you'll love it
feat.subtitle: Cutting-edge technology at the service of pure play.
feat.multiplayer.d: WebRTC P2P with TURN/STUN relay. Play against friends or worldwide opponents with imperceptible latency.
feat.tournaments.d: Brackets, timed challenges, regional leaderboards. A reason to come back every day.
feat.rewards.d: Achievements, card cosmetics, seasonal badges. All earnable, nothing to pay.
feat.offline.d: 8 AI bots at varying difficulty levels. Play without a connection, sync back when you reconnect.
feat.graphics.d: 60 FPS smooth animations, HD card designs, seasonal themes.
feat.ranking.d: ELO system per game, live leaderboards, detailed progression statistics.
how.title: Get started in 3 steps
how.subtitle: Download, install, play — under a minute.
how.step1.d: Get the APK file directly from this site (≈ 211 MB, signed).
how.step2.d: Allow unknown sources in Android settings, then open the APK to confirm.
how.step3.d: Pick a Solitaire variant and start your first game in solo or multiplayer mode.
screens.title: Designed for mobile, built for you
screens.subtitle: A peek at the app's screens.
testi.title: What players say
testi.subtitle: Early feedback from our closed beta.
testi.1.name: Yassine B.
testi.1.text: Solitaire is smooth, beautiful, and the bots are genuinely smart. I play every evening.
testi.2.name: Sara M.
testi.2.text: Finally a clean card app, in Arabic and French, ad-free. Can't wait for Ronda.
testi.3.name: Karim L.
testi.3.text: P2P multiplayer works even on 3G. Hats off to the developers, this is serious work.
cta.title: Ready to deal?
cta.subtitle: Solitaire is available now. The 9 other games arrive in the coming weeks.
footer.aboutText: SallyCards is published by SallyStar, a Casablanca-based studio. Our mission: bring traditional MENA card games into the modern digital age.
footer.legal: © 2026 SallyCards · SallyStar SARL · Casablanca · All rights reserved.
download.title: Download Sally Solitaire
download.subtitle: The signed APK is auto-published on every update via GitHub Actions. Direct download, instant install.
download.apkLabel: Debug APK auto-built via GitHub Actions
download.install2: Download the APK using the button above
download.install3: Open the .apk file and confirm the installation
download.install4: Launch Sally Solitaire from your app drawer
download.googleDesc: The Play Store version is under Google review. Live in a few weeks.
download.iosDesc: The iOS version is under Apple TestFlight review. Sign up to be notified.
